title: oplismenus penicillatus
intro: Oplismenus penicillatus, also known as tufted hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus penicillatus include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Oplismenus penicillatus is often prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
